prompt: An absolutely breathtaking, ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait of an ethereal young woman with impossibly long, silky platinum-white hair flowing gracefully in a soft summer breeze, luminous porcelain skin, sparkling blue-grey eyes, delicate rosy cheeks, and glossy peach-pink lips. She sits elegantly on a curved stone promenade beside a crystal-clear emerald lake, her body turned slightly toward the camera while gently crossing one leg forward and resting both hands naturally on her lap. She looks directly into the lens with a soft, magnetic smile that feels effortless, confident, and unforgettable. She wears a luxurious fitted burgundy satin spaghetti-strap camisole that perfectly contrasts with flowing high-waisted ivory palazzo trousers crafted from lightweight silk. A delicate gold pendant necklace, minimalist rings, and tiny pearl earrings complete the timeless luxury aesthetic. Behind her, a magnificent fountain sends sparkling water high into the air while lush emerald trees, blooming flowers, and shimmering reflections create a dreamy park paradise. Golden-hour sunlight bathes the scene in warm honey tones, illuminating every strand of her platinum hair with a glowing halo. Gentle wind creates natural movement in her hair and clothing, while floating dust particles and subtle lens flare add cinematic magic. Captured on a Canon EOS R5, 85mm f/1.2L portrait lens, f/1.2, creating razor-sharp focus on her eyes with an incredibly creamy background bokeh. Hyper-realistic skin texture, individually detailed hair strands, luxury fashion styling, premium editorial color grading, HDR lighting, cinematic depth, soft bloom, sparkling water highlights, magazine-cover composition, luxury lifestyle aesthetic, Pinterest trending, Instagram viral, TikTok stop-scrolling, elegant summer fashion campaign, photorealistic, masterpiece quality, ultra-detailed, 8K, HDR, natural light, award-winning photography, editorial Vogue aesthetic, luxury campaign quality, perfect composition, aspect ratio 3:4.
